summary: Relax session creation constraints while keeping teacher submission guarded by roster presence. Ship this phase together with phase 7 so operators can complete incomplete sessions immediately.

steps.name: document-session-policy
steps.summary: Documented create-first session policy in architecture notes, including the zero-roster submission guard and the same-release bundle with phase 7 session management.

steps.name: nullable-teacher-migration
steps.summary: Confirmed `sessions.teacher_id` is nullable in schema and migration artifacts so unassigned sessions are represented by `null` instead of placeholder teachers.

steps.name: unassigned-session-queries
steps.summary: Locked operator dashboard and records regression coverage so unassigned sessions remain visible and continue to fall back to `강사 미할당` in operator-facing flows.

steps.name: relax-session-create
steps.summary: Confirmed session creation accepts empty teacher and empty initial roster while still validating class, village, and business scope and creating snapshots only when participants exist.

steps.name: submission-empty-roster-guard
steps.summary: Confirmed teacher submission blocks zero-snapshot sessions in both service logic and teacher UI guidance until operators finish participant setup.
